TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Igor_Dodon, title = Igor_Dodon, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Igor_Dodon} }

S.FORM: Igor Dodon ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 2, Igor Dodon, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1975) mrhuw Moldova ta' misuw hya' ga Igor Dodon, aring ryax tay 23 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Igor Dodon ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 2, Igor Dodon, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1975) mrhuw Moldova ta' misuw hya' ga Igor Dodon, aring ryax tay 23 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: iɣor *o*on rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, iɣor *o*on, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw mol*o*a taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa iɣor *o*on, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
